summary:
I've found and fixed the needle in the haystack. The issue was an off-by-one error in the batch processing logic in `processor.py`. The original code was setting the end index of each batch as `start + batch_size - 1`, which caused it to miss the last record in each batch. I corrected it to `start + batch_size` to ensure all records are processed.

Running the test script `test.sh` after the fix confirms that all tests now pass, as indicated by the output: "PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries". The problem is resolved.
